nimble_init.tooltip: Initialize the NimBLE Bluetooth stack and set the device broadcast name

nimble_deinit.tooltip: Close the NimBLE Bluetooth stack and choose whether to clear all configurations

nimble_server_create_service.message0: Server %1 creates service UUID %2 and saves it to %3
nimble_server_create_service.tooltip: Create a BLE service on the server

nimble_service_create_characteristic.message0: Service %1 Creates feature UUID %2 Save to %3
nimble_service_create_characteristic.tooltip: Create a read-write characteristic value in the service

nimble_service_create_characteristic_pro.message0: Service %1 Create feature UUID %2 Attribute %3 Save to %4
nimble_service_create_characteristic_pro.tooltip: Creates a characteristic value with the specified properties in the service

nimble_start_advertising.tooltip: Start BLE broadcast so that the device can be discovered

nimble_advertising_add_service.tooltip: Add service UUID in broadcast data

nimble_advertising_set_name.tooltip: Set the device name for broadcast display

nimble_server_connected_count.tooltip: Get the number of currently connected clients

nimble_on_connect.message0: When the client connects to the server %1
nimble_on_connect.tooltip: Code executed when a client connects

nimble_on_disconnect.message0: When the client disconnects the server %1 connection
nimble_on_disconnect.tooltip: Code executed when the client disconnects

nimble_on_characteristic_write.tooltip: Code executed when the characteristic value is written by the client

nimble_start_scan.tooltip: Start scanning for BLE devices, 0 means continuous scanning

nimble_is_scanning.tooltip: Check if scanning is taking place

nimble_on_scan_result.tooltip: Code executed when a BLE device is scanned, you can use the scanDevice variable to obtain device information

nimble_scan_device_name.tooltip: Get the scanned device name (used in the scan callback)

nimble_scan_device_address.tooltip: Get the scanned device address (used in the scan callback)

nimble_scan_device_rssi.tooltip: Get the RSSI signal strength of the scanned device (used in the scan callback)

nimble_scan_device_has_service.tooltip: Checks whether the scanned device broadcasts the specified service UUID

nimble_client_connect_address.tooltip: Connect to the BLE device at the specified address and return whether it is successful.

nimble_client_connect_device.tooltip: Connect to device in scan callback

nimble_client_is_connected.tooltip: Check if the client is connected

nimble_client_get_service.message0: Client %1 gets service UUID %2 and saves it to %3
nimble_client_get_service.tooltip: Get the specified service from the remote server

nimble_remote_service_get_characteristic.message0: Remote Service %1 Get characteristic UUID %2 Save to %3
nimble_remote_service_get_characteristic.tooltip: Get the specified characteristics from the remote service

nimble_remote_char_read.message0: Read the value of remote feature %1
nimble_remote_char_read.tooltip: Read the value of a remote characteristic

nimble_remote_char_subscribe.tooltip: Subscribe to notifications of remote features and execute callbacks when data is received. You can use the notifyData variable to obtain data.

nimble_notify_data.tooltip: Get the data received in the notification callback (used in the subscription callback)

nimble_get_address.tooltip: Get the BLE address of the local machine

nimble_set_mtu.tooltip: Set the maximum transmission unit size of BLE data packets
